rationale: The only resume change was swapping employer names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), which carries no job-relevant signal — both name sets are equally unknown and the candidate's skills, experience, and accomplishments are unchanged. Yet the score dropped from 4 to 3. The two evaluations cite the same three substantive concerns (no recent Java, basic German, overqualification) in reworded form, so there is no justified basis for the lower score; the drop appears to track the employer-name change rather than any real difference.
